issues.issue_description: Your endpoint does not encrypt data at rest!
issues.agent_last_action: Evidence insufficient. Re-request email sent. Missing: Evidence showing BitLocker or another form of encryption is actively enabled and fully encrypted on the endpoint's data at rest.
issues.agent_reasoning: The vendor provided a screenshot of a PowerShell command showing BitLocker is not enabled on the C: drive, directly contradicting the control requirement for encryption at rest.
issues.missing: Evidence showing BitLocker or another form of encryption is actively enabled and fully encrypted on the endpoint's data at rest.

audit_trail.action: Issue created via dashboard. Agent will send remediation email on next cycle.
Remediation request email sent to viditg@uw.edu
Vendor reply received from Vidit Gupta <viditg@uw.edu>. Evidence extracted.

Gemini evaluation complete. Decision: INSUFFICIENT. Missing: Evidence showing BitLocker or another form of encryption is actively enabled and fully encrypted on the endpoint's data at rest.. Scores: R=95, M=0, S=0
Re-request email sent to viditg@uw.edu. Awaiting revised evidence.
